```{r}
                     startDate = min(as_date(ymrDat$dateTime), na.rm = T), 
                     endDate = max(as_date(ymrDat$dateTime), na.rm = T)) %>% 
  renameNWISColumns() %>% 
  select(-site_no, -agency_cd, -Flow_Inst_cd, -tz_cd) %>% 
  rename(FlowCFS = Flow_Inst) %>% 
  mutate(FlowCMS = FlowCFS * 0.028316847,
         areaM2 = elkKm2 * 1e6,
         areaKM2 = elkKm2,
         FlowScaled = FlowCMS * (ymrKm2/elkKm2),
         Site = "ELK", .keep = "unused")
```

\

```{r}
#Merge YMR and Elk Data
ymrElk <- ymrDat %>% 
  full_join(rawElkQ) %>% 
  group_by(Site) %>% 
  mutate(FlowCMS = na.approx(FlowCMS, maxgap = 10, na.rm = F),
         WaterYear = calcWaterYear(dateTime),
         FlowScaled = coalesce(FlowScaled, FlowCMS)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  drop_na(FlowCMS)

ymrElk %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = dateTime, y = FlowScaled, color = Site)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~ WaterYear, scales = "free_x") +
  #scale_y_log10(labels = label_number())+
  scale_x_datetime()+
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  labs(x = "",
       y = expression(Discharge~("m"^3*"s"^{-1}/"km"^2))) +
  theme_few()+
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), axis.title.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.title = element_blank()) -> ymrElkQScaled
ymrElkQScaled
ggsave("ymrElkQ_Scaled.png", ymrElkQScaled, here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.29, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

ymrElk %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = dateTime, y = FlowCMS, color = Site)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~ WaterYear, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_y_log10(labels = label_number())+
  scale_x_datetime()+
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  labs(x = "",
       y = expression(Discharge~("m"^3*"s"^{-1}))) +
  theme_few()+
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), axis.title.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.title = element_blank()) -> ymrElkQ
ymrElkQ
ggsave("ymrElkQ.png", ymrElkQ, here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.29, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

ymrElkWide <- ymrDat %>% 
  rename(ymrQ = FlowCMS, ymrM2 = areaM2, ymrKM2 = areaKM2) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::select(-Site) %>% 
  full_join(rawElkQ %>% rename(elkQ = FlowCMS, elkM2 = areaM2, elkKM2 = areaKM2) %>% select(-Site)) %>% 
  mutate(ymrQ = na.approx(ymrQ, maxgap = 10, na.rm = F),
         elkQ = na.approx(elkQ, maxgap = 10, na.rm = F),
         WaterYear = calcWaterYear(dateTime),
         elkM2 = na_locf(elkM2),
         elkKM2 = na_locf(elkKM2),
         elkQ_Scaled = na.approx(FlowScaled, maxgap = 10, na.rm = F)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(ymrQ) & !is.na(elkQ) & WaterYear < "2024")

ymrElkWide %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = elkQ, y = ymrQ)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "Elk River",
       y = "Youngmeyer") +
  geom_smooth(method='lm') +
  stat_regline_equation(aes(label = ..rr.label..))+
  theme_few()+
  facet_wrap(~WaterYear, scales = "free_x") -> ymrElkQBiPlt
ymrElkQBiPlt
ggsave("ymrElkQBiPlt.png", ymrElkQBiPlt, here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.29, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

# Cross-Correlation Analysis
ccfRes <- ccf(ymrElkWide$elkQ_Scaled, ymrElkWide$ymrQ)
ccfDf <- data.frame(lag = ccfRes$lag, correlation = ccfRes$acf)
# Find the lag with the highest correlation
maxCorrLag <- ccfDf %>%
  filter(correlation == max(correlation)) %>%
  pull(lag)
cat("Lag with the highest correlation:", maxCorrLag, "\n")

# Interpretation
if (maxCorrLag > 0) {
  cat("elkQ lags behind ymrQ by", maxCorrLag, "time steps.\n")
} else if (maxCorrLag < 0) {
  cat("ymrQ lags behind elkQ by", abs(maxCorrLag), "time steps.\n")
} else {
  cat("ymrQ and elkQ are not correlated at zero lag.\n")
}


# Create a new data frame with lagged YMR discharge
ymrElkWide <- ymrElkWide %>%
    mutate(elkQadj = lag(elkQ_Scaled, maxCorrLag),
           qDiff = elkQadj - ymrQ)

# Scatter Plot with Lagged Data
ymrElkWide %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = elkQadj, y = ymrQ)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "Elk River",
       y = "Youngmeyer") +
  geom_smooth(method='lm') +
  stat_regline_equation(aes(label = ..rr.label..))+
  theme_few()

rm(ccfDf, ccfRes)
```

# Hydro Metrics

```{r}
gpDat <- gpDat %>% 
  mutate(
    WaterYear = calcWaterYear(dateTime),
    Period = case_when(WaterYear == 2021 ~ "2021",
                       WaterYear == 2022 ~ "2022",
                       WaterYear == 2023 ~ "2023",
                       WaterYear == 2024 ~ "2024")) %>% 
  group_by(Site, Period) %>%
  arrange(desc(SW_Level_cm)) %>%
  mutate(ExceedanceProbability = (row_number() / (n() + 1)) * 100)

gpDat %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = ExceedanceProbability, y = SW_Level_cm, color = Period)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_y_log10(labels = label_number()) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("1991-2020" = "black", "2021" = "#1B9E77", "2022" = "#D95F02", "2023" = "#7570B3", "2024" = "#E7298A")) +
  labs(x = "Exceedance Probability (%)",
       y = "SW Level (cm)") +
  theme_few()+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.title = element_blank())+
  facet_wrap(~Site)
```

```{r}
dailyQ <- gpDat %>% 
  mutate(Date = ymd(floor_date(solar.time, "1 day"))) %>%
  group_by(Site, Date) %>%
  summarize(Flow = mean(Q_Ls, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  mutate(Flow = replace_na(Flow, 0),
         Flow = ifelse(Flow < 0, 0, Flow)) %>% 
  select(gage = Site, Date, Flow)

for (i in unique(dailyQ$gage)) {
  siteData <- filter(dailyQ, gage == i)
  fileName <- paste0(i, ".csv") # Customize the file name as needed
write.csv(siteData, paste0(here("Data/GP_Q/"), fileName), row.names = FALSE)
}

## Run sub_annual_metrics script
```

```{r}
dryingMet <- read_csv(here("Data/GP_metrics_by_event_Q.csv")) %>% 
  drop_na(event_id) %>% 
  mutate(dryDateStart = ymd(paste0(calendar_year, "-01-01")) + days(dry_date_start - 1),
         Date = dryDateStart,
         dryDateEnd = ymd(Date + days(dry_dur - 1)),
         peakDate = ymd(paste0(calendar_year, "-01-01")) + days(peak_date - 1))

#Merge hydro metrics with ts
hydroTS <- dailyQ %>% 
  full_join(dryingMet, by = c("gage", "Date"))
```

```{r}
hydroTS %>%
  ggplot(aes(Date, Flow)) +
  geom_line(color = "#0084a8") +
  ylab("Q (L/s)") +
  theme_few() +
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = dryDateStart, xmax = dryDateEnd, ymin = -Inf, ymax = +Inf),
    fill = "#d3d3d3",
    alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = peakDate, xmax = peakDate + 1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = +Inf),
    fill = "#ff0000",
    alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_x_date() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ gage, scales = "free") -> hydroMetQ
ggsave("hydroMetQ.png", hydroMetQ, here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.29, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

```

## Merge with DO Metrics

```{r}
# Expand dryingMet to include all dates between peak_date and dry_date_start
# dryingMet <- dryingMet %>%
#   rowwise() %>%
#   mutate(date_seq = list(seq(peakDate, dryDateStart, by = "day"))) %>%
#   unnest(date_seq) %>%
#   rename(Date = date_seq)
```

## Stage

```{r}
gpDat %>%
  ggplot(aes(dateTime, SW_Level_cm)) +
  geom_line(color = "#000000") +
  ylab("SW Level (cm)") +
  theme_few() +
  scale_x_datetime() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales = "free")

dailyStage <- gpDat %>% 
  mutate(Date = ymd(floor_date(solar.time, "1 day"))) %>%
  group_by(Site, Date) %>%
  summarize(Flow = mean(SW_Level_cm, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  mutate(Flow = replace_na(Flow, 0),
         Flow = ifelse(Flow < 0, 0, Flow)) %>% 
  select(gage = Site, Date, Flow)

for (i in unique(dailyStage$gage)) {
  siteData <- filter(dailyStage, gage == i)
  fileName <- paste0(i, ".csv") # Customize the file name as needed
  write.csv(siteData, paste0(here("Data/GP_Stage/"), fileName), row.names = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
dryingMetStage <- read_csv(here("Data/GP_metrics_by_event_Stage.csv")) %>% 
  drop_na(event_id) %>%
  mutate(dryDateStart = ymd(paste0(calendar_year, "-01-01")) + days(dry_date_start - 1),
         dryDateEnd = ymd(dryDateStart + days(dry_dur - 1)),
         peakDate = ymd(paste0(calendar_year, "-01-01")) + days(peak_date - 1)) %>% 
    select(-season, -meteorologic_year, -calendar_year, -peak_date, -dry_date_start, -dry_date_mean) 

#Merge hydro metrics with ts
dailyStageDrying <- dailyStage %>% 
  full_join(dryingMetStage %>% mutate(Date = peakDate), by = c("gage", "Date"))

dailyStageDrying %>%
  ggplot(aes(Date, Flow)) +
  geom_line(color = "#0084a8") +
  ylab("Stage (cm)") +
  theme_few() +
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = dryDateStart, xmax = dryDateEnd, ymin = -Inf, ymax = +Inf),
    fill = "#d3d3d3",
    alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = peakDate, xmax = peakDate + 1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = +Inf),
    fill = "#ff0000",
    alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_x_date() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ gage, scales = "free") -> hydroMetStage
hydroMetStage
#ggsave("hydroMetStage.png", hydroMetStage, here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.29, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

```

```{r}
gpDryMetStage <- dryingMetStage %>% 
  rename(Site = gage) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  drop_na()
#PCA
dryPca <- gpDryMetStage %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(peak2zero, drying_rate, dry_dur, peak_value, peak_quantile) %>% 
  select(where(is.numeric)) %>% # retain only numeric columns
  prcomp(center = T, scale = T) # do PCA on scaled data

#extract loadings
dryPcaLoad <- dryPca %>%
  tidy(matrix = "loadings")
dryPcaLoad
#Variance explained
dryPcaEig <- dryPca %>%
  tidy(matrix = "eigenvalues")
dryPcaEig
#Scree plot
fviz_eig(dryPca, addlabels = TRUE)

#Qual of representation
fviz_cos2(dryPca, choice = "var", axes = 1)
fviz_cos2(dryPca, choice = "var", axes = 2)

#Biplot
fviz_pca_biplot(dryPca, 
                col.ind = gpDryMetStage$Site,
                palette =  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(3, "Dark2"), 
                addEllipses = F,
                label = "var",
                col.var = "black",
                repel = TRUE,
                legend.title = "")+
  theme_few()
```

## Merge Metrics W/Stage

```{r}
dryingMetStageExp <- dryingMetStage %>%
  group_by(gage, event_id) %>% 
  rowwise() %>%
  do(data.frame(Date = seq(.$peakDate, .$dryDateStart, by = "day"), .)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  rename(Site = gage)

gpMetrics <- doMet %>% 
  full_join(dryingMetStageExp) %>% 
  drop_na() %>% 
  select(-WaterYear, -Year, -season, -minDO.obs, -maxDO.obs, -avgDO.obs, -totalDO, -DO.amp, -probHyp, -cvDO.obs, -dayProbConc, -nightProbConc, -NHR_obs, -SW_Level_ft, -DO.hyp, -DOSat.hyp, -dryDateStart, -dryDateEnd, -peakDate) %>% 
  mutate(WaterYear = calcWaterYear(Date))

## I use this till tidyverse implements a scale function
scale_numeric <- function(x) mutate_if(x, is.numeric, function(y) as.vector(scale(y)))

gpMetrics %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(where(is.numeric)) %>% # retain only numeric columns
  scale_numeric() %>%  # center and scale
  cor(method = "pearson") %>%
  car::scatterplotMatrix()

gpMetrics %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(where(is.numeric)) %>% # retain only numeric columns
  scale_numeric() %>%  # center and scale
  cor(method = "pearson") %>%
  corrplot(type = "upper")
```

```{r}
gpMetrics %>%
  filter(drying_rate < 0) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(peak2zero, avgDO.pctsat)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "Peak Stage to Zero",
       y = expression(Daily ~ Avg. ~ DO["%Sat"]))+
  geom_smooth(method='lm') +
  stat_regline_equation(aes(label = ..rr.label..))+
  theme_few() -> doDrying
doDrying
ggsave("doDryingLM.png", doDrying, here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.29, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")
summary(lm(avgDO.pctsat ~ drying_rate, data = gpMetrics %>% filter(drying_rate<0)))
```

```{r}
# Subset data to only include relevant columns
metrics <- gpMetrics %>%
  select(minDO.pctsat, maxDO.pctsat, avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, probHypSat, NHR_sat,
         peak_value, peak_quantile, peak2zero, drying_rate, dry_dur) %>% 
  filter(drying_rate < 0)
# Function to create scatter plot with regression line
create_plot <- function(x_var, y_var, data, x_label, y_label) {
  ggplot(data, aes_string(x = x_var, y = y_var)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    stat_regline_equation(aes(label = ..rr.label..))+
    labs(x = x_label, y = y_label)
}

# List of DO metrics and drying metrics
do_metrics <- c("minDO.pctsat", "maxDO.pctsat", "avgDO.pctsat", "DOpctsat.amp", "probHypSat", "NHR_sat")
drying_metrics <- c("peak_value", "peak_quantile", "peak2zero", "drying_rate", "dry_dur")

# Initialize an empty dataframe to store significant results
significant_results <- data.frame()

# Loop through each DO metric and drying metric pair
for (do_metric in do_metrics) {
  for (drying_metric in drying_metrics) {
    # Create the formula for the linear model
    formula <- as.formula(paste(do_metric, "~", drying_metric))
    
    # Fit the linear model
    model <- lm(formula, data = metrics)
    
    # Tidy the model results
    tidied_model <- tidy(model)
    
    # Filter for significant results (p-value < 0.05)
    significant <- tidied_model %>%
      filter(term != "(Intercept)" & p.value < 0.05)
    
    # If there are significant results, add them to the dataframe
    if (nrow(significant) > 0) {
      significant <- significant %>%
        mutate(DO_metric = do_metric, Drying_metric = drying_metric)
      significant_results <- rbind(significant_results, significant)
    }
  }
}

# Generate plots for each pair of DO metric and drying metric
plot_list <- list()
for (do_metric in do_metrics) {
  for (drying_metric in drying_metrics) {
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- create_plot(drying_metric, do_metric, metrics, drying_metric, do_metric)
  }
}

# Arrange plots in a grid
cursedLMs <- grid.arrange(grobs = plot_list, ncol = length(drying_metrics))
```

```{r}
# Subset data to only include relevant columns for clustering
metrics <- gpMetrics %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(minDO.pctsat, maxDO.pctsat, avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, probHypSat, NHR_sat,
         peak_value, peak_quantile, peak2zero, drying_rate, dry_dur)

# Determine optimal number of clusters using the elbow method
set.seed(123)
fviz_nbclust(metrics, kmeans, method = "wss")

# Perform K-means clustering with optimal number of clusters (e.g., k = 3)
set.seed(123)
kmeans_result <- kmeans(metrics, centers = 3, nstart = 25)

# Add the cluster assignment to the original data
metrics$cluster <- kmeans_result$cluster
cluster_summary <- metrics %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), list(mean = mean, sd = sd), na.rm = TRUE))

print(cluster_summary)

# Visualize the clustering results
fviz_cluster(kmeans_result, data = metrics, geom = "point",
             stand = FALSE, ellipse = TRUE, show.clust.cent = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "K-means Clustering of DO and Drying Metrics")

# Reshape data for easier plotting
metrics <- metrics %>%
  mutate(cluster = as.factor(cluster))

metrics_long <- metrics %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -cluster, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")

# Create boxplots for each variable by cluster
ggplot(metrics_long, aes(x = cluster, y = value, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Boxplots of Variables by Cluster", x = "Cluster", y = "Value")
```

```{r}
# Subset data to only include relevant columns for clustering
metrics <- gpMetrics %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(minDO.pctsat, maxDO.pctsat, avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, probHypSat, NHR_sat,
         peak_value, peak_quantile, peak2zero, drying_rate, dry_dur)

# Remove rows with missing or infinite values
metrics <- metrics %>%
  filter_all(all_vars(!is.na(.))) %>%
  filter_all(all_vars(!is.infinite(.)))
# Scale the data
metrics_scaled <- scale(metrics)

# Compute the dissimilarity matrix
dist_matrix <- dist(metrics_scaled)

# Perform hierarchical clustering
hc_result <- hclust(dist_matrix, method = "ward.D2")

# Plot the dendrogram
plot(hc_result, labels = FALSE, hang = -1, main = "Hierarchical Clustering Dendrogram")

# Cut the dendrogram to form clusters (e.g., cut into 3 clusters)
k <- 3 # Adjust based on the dendrogram
clusters <- cutree(hc_result, k = k)

# Add the cluster assignment to the original data
metrics <- metrics %>%
  mutate(cluster = as.factor(clusters))

cluster_centroids <- metrics %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), mean, na.rm = TRUE))

cluster_summary <- metrics %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), list(mean = mean, sd = sd), na.rm = TRUE))

# Visualize the clustering results using a scatter plot matrix
fviz_cluster(data = metrics, cluster = clusters, geom = "point",
             stand = FALSE, ellipse = TRUE, show.clust.cent = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Hierarchical Clustering of DO and Drying Metrics")

# Reshape data for easier plotting with ggplot2
metrics_long <- metrics %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -cluster, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")

# Create boxplots for each variable by cluster
ggplot(metrics_long, aes(x = cluster, y = value, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Boxplots of Variables by Cluster", x = "Cluster", y = "Value")

```

# PCA

## DO PCA

```{r}
#PCA
doPca <- gpMetrics %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(minDO.pctsat, maxDO.pctsat, avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, probHypSat,  NHR_sat) %>% 
  #m dayProbSat, nightProbSat,
  select(where(is.numeric)) %>% # retain only numeric columns
  prcomp(center = T, scale = T) # do PCA on scaled data

#extract loadings
doPcaLoad <- doPca %>%
  tidy(matrix = "loadings")
doPcaLoad
#Variance explained
doPcaEig <- doPca %>%
  tidy(matrix = "eigenvalues")
doPcaEig
#Scree plot
fviz_eig(doPca, addlabels = TRUE)

#Qual of representation
fviz_cos2(doPca, choice = "var", axes = 1)
fviz_cos2(doPca, choice = "var", axes = 2)

#Biplot
fviz_pca_biplot(doPca, 
                col.ind = gpMetrics$Site,
                palette =  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(3, "Dark2"), 
                addEllipses = T,
                label = "var",
                col.var = "black",
                repel = TRUE,
                legend.title = "")+
  theme_few()
```

## Drying PCA

```{r}
#PCA
dryPca <- gpMetrics %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(peak2zero, drying_rate, dry_dur, peak_value, peak_quantile) %>% 
  select(where(is.numeric)) %>% # retain only numeric columns
  prcomp(center = T, scale = T) # do PCA on scaled data

#extract loadings
dryPcaLoad <- dryPca %>%
  tidy(matrix = "loadings")
dryPcaLoad
#Variance explained
dryPcaEig <- dryPca %>%
  tidy(matrix = "eigenvalues")
dryPcaEig
#Scree plot
fviz_eig(dryPca, addlabels = TRUE)

#Qual of representation
fviz_cos2(dryPca, choice = "var", axes = 1)
fviz_cos2(dryPca, choice = "var", axes = 2)

#Biplot
fviz_pca_biplot(dryPca, 
                col.ind = gpMetrics$Site,
                palette =  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(3, "Dark2"), 
                addEllipses = F,
                label = "var",
                col.var = "black",
                repel = TRUE,
                legend.title = "")+
  theme_few()
```

## USGS Dat

```{r}
usgsMet <- read_csv(here("Data/USGS_AllMetrics.csv")) %>% 
  rename(Site = siteName)

allMetrics <- gpMetrics %>% 
  full_join(usgsMet) %>% 
  select(-Q_Ls, -SW_Level_cm, -cvDO.pctsat, -event_id, -WaterYear)
```

### DO PCA

```{r}
#PCA
allDoPca <- allMetrics %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(minDO.pctsat, maxDO.pctsat, avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, probHypSat,  NHR_sat) %>% 
  #m dayProbSat, nightProbSat,
  select(where(is.numeric)) %>% # retain only numeric columns
  prcomp(center = T, scale = T) # do PCA on scaled data

#extract loadings
allDoPcaLoad <- doPca %>%
  tidy(matrix = "loadings")
allDoPcaLoad
#Variance explained
allDoPcaEig <- doPca %>%
  tidy(matrix = "eigenvalues")
allDoPcaEig
#Scree plot
fviz_eig(allDoPca, addlabels = TRUE)

#Qual of representation
fviz_cos2(allDoPca, choice = "var", axes = 1)
fviz_cos2(allDoPca, choice = "var", axes = 2)

#Biplot
fviz_pca_biplot(allDoPca, 
                col.ind = allMetrics$Site,
                palette =  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(7, "Dark2"), 
                addEllipses = F,
                label = "var",
                col.var = "black",
                repel = TRUE,
                legend.title = "")+
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6))+
  theme_few()
```

### Dry PCA

```{r}
#PCA
allDryPca <- allMetrics %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(peak2zero, drying_rate, dry_dur, peak_value, peak_quantile) %>% 
  select(where(is.numeric)) %>% # retain only numeric columns
  prcomp(center = T, scale = T) # do PCA on scaled data

#extract loadings
allDryPcaLoad <- allDryPca %>%
  tidy(matrix = "loadings")
allDryPcaLoad
#Variance explained
allDryPcaEig<- allDryPca %>%
  tidy(matrix = "eigenvalues")
allDryPcaEig
#Scree plot
fviz_eig(allDryPca, addlabels = TRUE)

#Qual of representation
fviz_cos2(allDryPca, choice = "var", axes = 1)
fviz_cos2(allDryPca, choice = "var", axes = 2)

#Biplot
fviz_pca_biplot(allDryPca, 
                col.ind = allMetrics$Site,
                palette =  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(7, "Dark2"), 
                addEllipses = F,
                label = "var",
                col.var = "black",
                repel = TRUE,
                legend.title = "")+
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6))+
  theme_few()
```

# Clustering

```{r}
allMetricsScaled <- allMetrics %>%
  select(minDO.pctsat, maxDO.pctsat, avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, probHypSat, cvDO.pctsat, dayProbSat, nightProbSat, NHR_sat) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(where(is.numeric)) %>% # retain only numeric columns
  scale_numeric()
```

```{r}
fviz_nbclust(allMetricsScaled, kmeans, method = "wss")
gapStat <- clusGap(allMetricsScaled, FUN = kmeans, K.max = 10, B = 100)
fviz_gap_stat(gapStat)

gpKmeans <- kmeans(allMetricsScaled, centers = 6, nstart = 25)
fviz_cluster(gpKmeans, allMetricsScaled)
```

```{r}
# Determine the optimal number of clusters using the Elbow method
fviz_nbclust(allMetricsScaled, kmeans, method = "wss") +
  labs(subtitle = "Elbow method")

# Set the number of clusters (k)
set.seed(123) # For reproducibility
k <- 6  # You can choose the optimal k based on the Elbow method

# Perform k-means clustering
kmeans_result <- kmeans(allMetricsScaled, centers = k, nstart = 25)

# Ungroup the tibble if it is grouped
allMetrics <- allMetrics %>% ungroup()

# Add the cluster assignment to the original data
allMetrics <- allMetrics %>%
  mutate(cluster = kmeans_result$cluster)

# Visualize the clusters using the first two principal components
fviz_cluster(kmeans_result, data = allMetricsScaled,
             geom = "point", ellipse.type = "norm") +
  labs(title = "K-means Clustering",
       x = "Principal Component 1",
       y = "Principal Component 2")

# If you want to visualize clusters based on the original features,
# you can use pairs plot or ggplot for specific feature pairs
ggplot(allMetrics, aes(x = minDO.pctsat, y = maxDO.pctsat, color = as.factor(cluster))) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Clusters based on minDO.pctsat and maxDO.pctsat",
       x = "Minimum DO % Saturation",
       y = "Maximum DO % Saturation",
       color = "Cluster")
```

```{r}
# Compute the distance matrix
distMatrix <- dist(allMetricsScaled)

# Perform hierarchical clustering using the complete linkage method
hiClust <- hclust(distMatrix, method = "ward.D2")

# Plot the dendrogram
fviz_dend(hiClust, rect = TRUE, show_labels = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Hierarchical Clustering Dendrogram",
       x = "Observations",
       y = "Height")

# Cut the dendrogram to obtain the desired number of clusters
k <- 5  # You can choose the number of clusters based on the dendrogram
clusterAssignments <- cutree(hiClust, k = k)

# Add the cluster assignment to the original data
allMetrics <- allMetrics %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(cluster = clusterAssignments)

# Visualize the clusters using the first two principal components
fviz_cluster(list(data = allMetricsScaled, cluster = clusterAssignments),
             geom = "point", ellipse.type = "norm") +
  labs(title = "Hierarchical Clustering",
       x = "Principal Component 1",
       y = "Principal Component 2")

# Visualize clusters based on the original features and add site names
ggplot(allMetrics, aes(x = minDO.pctsat, y = maxDO.pctsat, color = as.factor(cluster))) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(aes(label = Site), hjust = 1.5, vjust = 1.5) +
  labs(title = "Clusters based on minDO.pctsat and maxDO.pctsat",
       x = "Minimum DO % Saturation",
       y = "Maximum DO % Saturation",
       color = "Cluster")
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}
fviz_nbclust(allMetricsScaled, kmeans, method = "wss")
gapStat <- clusGap(allMetricsScaled, FUN = kmeans, K.max = 10, B = 100)
fviz_gap_stat(gapStat)

gpKmeans <- kmeans(allMetricsScaled, centers = 6, nstart = 25)

# Compute the distance matrix
distMatrix <- dist(allSiteScaled)

# Perform hierarchical clustering using the complete linkage method
hiClust <- hclust(distMatrix, method = "ward.D2")

# Plot the dendrogram
fviz_dend(hiClust, rect = TRUE, show_labels = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Hierarchical Clustering Dendrogram",
       x = "Observations",
       y = "Height")

# Cut the dendrogram to obtain the desired number of clusters
k <- 6  # You can choose the number of clusters based on the dendrogram
clusterAssignments <- cutree(hiClust, k = k)

# Add the cluster assignment to the original data
allSiteMet <- allSiteMet %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(cluster = clusterAssignments)

# Visualize the clusters using the first two principal components
fviz_cluster(list(data = allSiteScaled, cluster = clusterAssignments),
             geom = "point", ellipse.type = "norm") +
  labs(title = "Hierarchical Clustering",
       x = "Principal Component 1",
       y = "Principal Component 2")

# Visualize clusters based on the original features and add site names
ggplot(allSiteMet, aes(x = minDO.pctsat, y = maxDO.pctsat, color = as.factor(cluster))) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(aes(label = Site), hjust = 1.5, vjust = 1.5) +
  labs(title = "Clusters based on minDO.pctsat and maxDO.pctsat",
       x = "Minimum DO % Saturation",
       y = "Maximum DO % Saturation",
       color = "Cluster")
```

```{r}
# Aggregate data by site
data_agg <- allSiteMet %>%
  #select(Site, minDO.pctsat, maxDO.pctsat, avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, probHypSat,  NHR_sat) %>% 
  #select(Site, peak2zero, drying_rate, dry_dur, peak_value, peak_quantile) %>% 
  select(-Date, -cluster) %>% 
  filter(Site %in% c ("KMZ", "SHN", "YMR")) %>% 
  group_by(Site) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), mean))

# Transform data for heatmap
heatmap_data <- data_agg %>%
  column_to_rownames("Site")

# Create heatmap
pheatmap::pheatmap(heatmap_data, scale = "row", clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
         clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean", clustering_method = "ward.D2",
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(50))

# Distance matrix
dist_matrix <- dist(heatmap_data)

# Hierarchical clustering
hc <- hclust(dist_matrix, method = "ward.D2")

# Plot dendrogram
plot(hc, labels = rownames(heatmap_data), main = "Dendrogram of Sites")
```
